pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo version to 0.8.12 for compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or report coverage for Java 21 bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency from the legacy webflux-ui artifact to the new starter-webflux-ui artifact required by Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration and may cause runtime errors or missing Swagger UI.
